label: near_miss

case_target.description: 当前 case 的主控制对象是 renderReportTemplate()，它固定模板源并把用户输入仅作为 model variable 传入。

should_not_report.reason: The Freemarker template source is the static constant REPORT_TEMPLATE defined at class load time. User input is passed only as a model variable via Map.of("title", title) to template.process(), never concatenated into the template source. validateTitle() in the service layer provides additional defense-in-depth via a strict regex allowlist.
should_not_report.false_positive_risk: A system that traces @RequestParam title → renderReportTemplate(safeTitle) → new Template(...) and sees user-derived 'title' reachable near the Template constructor — without checking whether 'title' entered the template *source* or only the *model map* — will incorrectly flag new Template() at util/TemplateUtil.java line 23 as a High-severity SSTI sink. A second trigger: a system that does not enter validateTitle() in the service layer will not recognize the regex guard.

controls.description: Strict regex allowlist permits only alphanumeric characters and a limited set of punctuation up to 128 chars. Freemarker control characters $, {, }, #, < are excluded.

Template source is the static constant REPORT_TEMPLATE defined at class load time and never modified. User input does not reach the template source argument of new Template() — the security guarantee comes from this source-vs-model separation, not from any filtering property of the ${title} syntax.
controls.code_snippet:
private static final String REPORT_TEMPLATE = "

${title}

Report Preview

";

controls.description: new Template() receives REPORT_TEMPLATE — a compile-time constant string — as its source. User input never reaches the template source argument.
controls.code_snippet: Template template = new Template("report", new StringReader(REPORT_TEMPLATE), CFG);

controls.description: User input is passed as a model variable via Map.of("title", title). Freemarker renders ${title} by value substitution — this is data binding, not code injection.

notes: Difficulty is 'hard': guard is split across two layers/files. Primary defense is the static template in util (source-vs-model distinction). Regex in service is defense-in-depth. A correct system must verify that new Template() receives only REPORT_TEMPLATE (a static constant), not the user-supplied title.
